name: section-36.3-opener
prompt: Whimsical digital illustration in warm cartoon style: a large traffic light (red/yellow/green) where each light contains a different icon: red has a warning triangle (risk), yellow has a magnifying glass (assessment), green has a thumbs-up (feasibility approved). A product manager stands beside it holding a scorecard clipboard. Data readiness gauges and regulatory shield icons float nearby. Soft gradients, playful proportions, no text.

name: section-36.4-opener
prompt: Whimsical digital illustration in warm cartoon style: four open case files arranged in a 2x2 grid on a desk, each showing a different industry scenario: a hospital with a triage clipboard, an e-commerce shopping cart with a ranking medal, a legal gavel with document stacks, and a customer support headset with routing arrows. A detective-style magnifying glass hovers over all four. Soft gradients, playful proportions, no text.

name: section-37.3-opener
prompt: Whimsical digital illustration in warm cartoon style: a large open book that functions as a control panel, with its pages covered in knobs, switches, and indicator lights instead of text. A developer adjusts the controls while a friendly AI robot reads the book from the other side. Decision trails and intent arrows flow out of the book. Soft gradients, playful proportions, no text.

name: section-37.4-opener
prompt: Whimsical digital illustration in warm cartoon style: a human developer and a small AI robot sitting side by side at a shared desk, pair-programming. The human holds a magnifying glass (verification), the robot types rapidly on the keyboard. Between them is a trust meter gauge pointing to 'Trust but Verify'. A checklist floats above with some items checked and some flagged. Soft gradients, playful proportions, no text.

name: section-37.5-opener
prompt: Whimsical digital illustration in warm cartoon style: a bridge connecting two floating islands. The left island has a rough prototype workshop (cardboard boxes, tape, quick sketches). The right island has a polished product factory (clean lines, quality badges, users). A developer walks across the bridge carrying a prototype, passing through quality gates (checkpoints with green lights) along the way. Soft gradients, playful proportions, no text.

name: section-38.3-opener
prompt: Whimsical digital illustration in warm cartoon style: a portable suitcase (representing portability) sitting open, containing neatly organized API connectors shaped like puzzle pieces in different colors (representing different providers: blue, green, orange). Next to the suitcase, chains are breaking apart (breaking lock-in). A developer holds a universal adapter plug. A small brain icon nearby has both chains and wings, representing cognitive lock-in vs freedom. Soft gradients, playful proportions, no text.

name: section-38.4-opener
prompt: Whimsical digital illustration in warm cartoon style: a mission control dashboard with multiple screens showing charts, alerts, and metrics. A developer sits in a command chair monitoring the screens. One screen shows a drift detector (a compass needle wobbling), another shows A/B test results (two paths diverging), and a third shows a cost meter. A small satellite dish on top broadcasts user feedback signals. Soft gradients, playful proportions, no text.
